name: Akui, Cleo, Freya
description:
"Are you our new roommate?"

I made this because I crave my roommate bots... On c.ai they were everywhere, not nearly enough here 🤧 (ts gon flop)

Uhhhh somebody help.... I can't make bots anymore chat.

Quick lil run down...

You found the house on Craigslist/Facebook asking for a fourth person to split bill costs, you took up that offer. (Without really knowing anything) and for the sake of it, your stuff is already in your new room... (Boxed)(but if you don't like that, I didn't write it in the bot desc anyways...)

(Left) Akui: Shy, quiet, bookworm

(Middle) Cleo: ball of energy, sweet, chaotic

(Right) Freya: stoic, grounded,

Anyways... Enjoy your three new roommates, I guess? :3

[ R E - U P L O A D ]
creator: Tokyo...
